caption: A woman with curly hair tied up and wearing black headphones and a black t-shirt is seated in a recording studio. She is positioned in front of a professional microphone on a boom arm. In the background, a black screen displays the name "Johnson" in red letters, and a sign above it reads "Employee Only". To her side, a yellow wall is visible. On-screen graphics include a logo that says "THE STUDIO PODCAST" and another that reads "BOSS TALK 101 By: 11 logo Studio". Across the sequence of frames, the woman maintains a similar position, though her facial expression shifts slightly, reflecting a moment of emotional reaction or a subtle change in her gaze as she speaks or listens. The background elements, equipment, and on-screen text remain constant throughout the clip.
